textByHash.14854b553f4c201a8501a916c3f3e69f4f00c635: I am Madame Caldarium! A pirate's life was for me, but lately I've been looking to expand my business, I'm getting old, ya see.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.471daac507bfed4f76dec44c5d2e8338991e5a6b: Hmm, well my spa isn't quite ready yet, but when it is, I'm sure that'll solve all of your sand related issues!
textByHash.730c3b0120ecc48c8463b0974400e67b1a13c85c: You guess? The sun is shining, the sea breeze is salty, what's not to enjoy?
textByHash.7771df596de5d2f8f06b07a09204b29c1c6a432d: I'm more concerned of their laziness, 'Can't work today Madame, I'm cursed!'. Bunch of idiots, the lot of 'em.
textByHash.86a4e52b6e1a3c725c32b0217cfd307f00e45185: Yes... I have plans adventurer, the local cave dwelling population are... Let's say, sorting something out.
textByHash.92b2d7c2c12aebff04448683eeee7115c02dc700: Ha! That's what the Rum is for!
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
